target.title: fix(update): preserve local package overrides
target.body:
## Summary

- Preserves local package overrides during package update flows, including standalone added `dist` files, and reports the recovery bundle when overrides are not reapplied.
- Keeps content-inventory validation strict for new tarballs while allowing already-published `2026.6.5` / `2026.6.5-beta.6` packages that predate `dist/postinstall-content-inventory.json`.
- Repairs the `main` merge conflict on `src/cli/update-cli.ts` and `src/infra/update-runner.ts`, then refreshes the branch to current `upstream/main`.
- Adds the missing zh-CN glossary entries needed for the docs check after the latest main merge.

## Verification

- `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`
- `pnpm docs:list`
- `PATH=/Users/jason/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin:$PATH pnpm check:docs`
- `git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD && git diff --check`
- `PATH=/Users/jason/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin:$PATH ./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/infra/package-local-overrides.ts src/infra/package-update-steps.test.ts src/infra/update-runner.test.ts docs/.i18n/glossary.zh-CN.json`
- `PATH=/Users/jason/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin:$PATH TMPDIR=/tmp node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/check-openclaw-package-tarball.test.ts test/scripts/postinstall-bundled-plugins.test.ts test/scripts/openclaw-cross-os-release-checks.test.ts src/infra/package-dist-inventory.test.ts src/infra/package-update-steps.test.ts src/infra/update-runner.test.ts src/cli/update-cli/progress.test.ts src/cli/update-cli.option-collisions.test.ts`
- `PATH=/Users/jason/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin:$PATH TMPDIR=/tmp node --import tsx --input-type=module` current-head local package override smoke
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main --codex-bin /Users/jason/.codex/openclaw-pr-autopilot/bin/codex-persist-sessions --model codex=gpt-5.5 --thinking codex=high` clean after the accepted standalone-added-file finding was fixed.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Package self-update preserves locally modified installed package files by default, captures standalone added `dist` files in the recovery bundle, reapplies trusted overrides only when requested, reports conflict file paths in human output when upstream changed the same file, and still exposes the preserved recovery bundle when package verification fails after a partial install mutation. This refresh also hardens local override path validation, rollback error reporting, package content-inventory enforcement, package-root tarball inventory validation, and release candidate symlink checks so they apply to files npm would actually package.

Real environment tested: Local macOS source checkout on current PR head `2ae1833519adf9b211a84454461fad2d7a9647da`, Node `v24.14.0`. The current-head smoke used real filesystem temp package roots and the real `runGlobalPackageUpdateSteps` / `writePackageDistInventory` implementation through `node --import tsx`; it was not a Vitest/mock assertion path. Focused Vitest coverage also exercised the tarball checker, cross-OS release inventory generation, update progress rendering, package inventory verification, package update runner, and update CLI behavior.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran a current-head terminal smoke with `node --import tsx --input-type=module`, creating temporary installed package roots, writing real package dist inventories, mutating installed `dist/index.js` as a local override, applying update contents, invoking `runGlobalPackageUpdateSteps`, and rendering `printResult` for a conflict result. Then ran focused tests, formatter check, oxlint, `git diff --check`, and nested autoreview on the same head.

Evidence after fix:

```text
OPENCLAW_UPDATE_CURRENT_HEAD_SMOKE default-preserve {"failedStep":null,"failedTail":null,"status":"preserved","conflicts":[],"installed":"export const updated = true;\n","recovery":"export const local = true;\n","steps":["global update"]}
OPENCLAW_UPDATE_CURRENT_HEAD_SMOKE missing-content-inventory-reject {"failedStep":"global install verify","failedTail":"Invalid package dist content inventory at dist/postinstall-content-inventory.json: expected packaged file hashes to match current dist files.","status":"preserved","conflicts":[],"installed":"export const updated_without_inventory = true;\n","recovery":"export const local = true;\n","steps":["global update"]}

Update Result: OK
  Local changes: conflict (0 added, 1 modified, 0 deleted)
  Local recovery: /tmp/openclaw-local-overrides-proof
  Local conflict: dist/index.js (target-changed)

Total time: 1ms
OPENCLAW_UPDATE_CURRENT_HEAD_SMOKE conflict-output-printed
```

Supplemental current-head proof:

```text
Test Files  3 passed (3)
Tests  157 passed (157)

Test Files  3 passed (3)
Tests  109 passed (109)

Test Files  3 passed (3)
Tests  153 passed (153)
```

```text
All matched files use the correct format.
node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs ... passed.
git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD && git diff --check passed.
```

```text
autoreview clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported
overall: patch is correct (0.78)
```

Observed result after fix: Default update preserved the local override, left the updated installed file in place, and stored the original local file in the recovery bundle. Package verification rejected the partially mutated package when content inventory no longer matched the installed `dist` contents, while still preserving the local override recovery bundle. Human non-JSON update output now includes the conflict path and reason: `dist/index.js (target-changed)`. The focused tests additionally proved top-level tarball files cannot satisfy package-scoped content inventory requirements, npm-omitted symlinks no longer block release candidate inventory generation, and the optional-dependency fallback fixture writes a valid post-update package inventory before verification.

What was not tested: A full `pnpm check` / full repository Vitest run was not rerun after the latest autoreview fixes because the touched surface was covered by the focused update, tarball, postinstall, cross-OS release, inventory, runner, CLI option/progress tests, formatter, oxlint, diff check, current-head real filesystem smoke, and nested autoreview. A fresh remote Crabbox run was not repeated after this local fix; the current-head real smoke above is the after-fix behavior proof for this branch.
target.author: fuller-stack-dev
